feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Greetings, we are interested to learn what functionality now replaces scope item 19C which is no longer available in 2402. Can SAP please recommend the Best Practice alternative approach we should adopt to achieve similar functionality?

entry.title: Integrate SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud to SAP Signavio CDS Views
entry.content:
I'm facing the issue in connecting the S4 HANA private cloud CDS Views with the SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

As you know the communication management apps are not available for the private cloud and seems like the CDS views integration is not possible without Communication user.

But in SAP documentation it shows that it is possible to do with the S4 HANA private cloud?

I'm trying to get the right direction to have this integration in place. Can anyone suggest?

entry.title: reading monitoring views using JDBC in HANA with runtime licesne
entry.content:
Hello folks,

I have a utility that makes JDBC calls to SAP HANA DB and only reads from the monitoring views there. No modifications or business data access is made. I use a HANA user with 'monitoring' role for this. We are migrating to SAP PCE environment soon and apparently, the HANA license there would be a 'runtime' license. There is concern that using the utility above for the read-only access to SAP HANA might still cause SAP license violation issues. SAP Licensing guides, indirect access guides and forum postings are providing contradicting information regarding whether its a violation or not, adding to my confusion. Please let me know whether I can continue to use my java utility to check the performance of HANA DB as mentioned above in SAP PCE HANA with runtime license. 

By the way, do you know anybody who is offering SAP PCE S/4 HANA environment for paid/free testing? SAP does not offer true SAP PCE test environment and we cannot test any license issues with environments procured in SAP Cloud Appliance Library trials. I'm trying with EPI use but not sure. 

Thank you!

-Regards

Aseg

entry.title: sap S/4HANA SERVICE - REQUEST MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to create a PM notification from a service request in SAP s/4hana but unable to find that functionality.

Fiori app --> "search service requests".

Please let me know if there is an option to create notifications from a service request (like a follow-up or automatic creation by configuring in SPRO) as per S/4HANA service 2023 latest release as it is needed in my scenario.

Thanks.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service

entry.title: Service tab is not available in maintenance order
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Private Edition, and while testing best practices (client 050), we were able to create corrective maintenance orders (YBA1). In the Operations tab, we could add a service for external operations, as shown in the image below:

However, when testing with our own data in a different client, the Services tab is not appearing, even though we are using the same order type.

Does anyone know why this might be happening? Could it be due to a missing configuration, or could it be related to roles or authorizations?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Error in Scope Item J62 BB 3Y5(XX)
entry.content:
During the activation of the scope item, comes a popup providing additional information about GROUP CURRENCY confirmation. The manual confirmation button is clicked, a reason is provided and confirmation is finished.

This seems to "do nothing" as it just goes back to the previous screen prior to the confirmation. How to actually confirm the group currency manual step?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to check recommended server specs for SAP S/4HAHA Private Cloud system?
entry.content:
Hello! 

We would like to know if there is a way to check the recommended server spec to run our SAP S/4HANA private cloud system (DB capacity, OS etc)

Is there a way to check recommended spec by SAP for each system?

entry.title: Best Practice additional scope id activation
entry.content:
We have activated BP Z_US_SOLUTION. Now we have a requirement to activate additional scope item in this solution.

About this scenario, SAP note 2938086 states the following:

"At a later point of time, if you need more scope items to be activated, you can change the Z_CUST solution and add the scope items you need, then activate them in Implementation Assistant.”

Question:

  • Can we just edit the solution activated and further activate the scope item needed? If so can we transport the activation of scope item from BP client to business client?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic approval for maintenance orders workflow is not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a reactive maintenance order, and according to the best practice for reactive maintenance (Reactive Maintenance (4HH_US)), we should be able to start a flexible workflow for approval. I sent the order, but it never reaches my inbox or gets approved. I can see the order in the Fiori application, and under the authorization status, I see that the automatic workflow has the order, but it’s been days, and it hasn’t been approved or rejected:

I thought the automatic approval workflow would approve the order instantly.

Does anyone know why this might be happening? Could it be due to a missing configuration? Is there a way to release this order from the current workflow to continue with the proces?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Best Practices for Commodity Management in Procurement/ Purchase
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Greetings of the Day!

Please share Best Practices for Commodity Management in Procurement/ Purchase for Business process steps & it's related configuration.

Thanks,

Ganesh

 

@suhas_barge

entry.title: Brazil Tax Reform - NF-e Technical Note 2024.002 and DF-e Technical Note 2024.001
entry.content:
Customer would like to know when SAP intends to provide more technical details about Brazil Tax Reform. According to the customer, Brazil Government has issued Technical Notes and customer needs to understand the impacts in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SKU 8011367, Extend data Volume
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Customer needs to purchase SKU 8011367, SAP Additional Database Storage, private cloud edition to extend Data Volume of HANA database (/hana/data).

Current existing BOMs:

8014072, RISE w SAP S4HANA Cld, priv ed, base ,  XXS t-shirt size  on C4C.

The Volume data size is 370 GB.

As per update in PCA Asset ‘PCE Wiki_Cloud4C_15th_Jul.pdf’ , ‘Guidance for Additional Storage on HANA instances’ section, It is not applicable to extend data volume size (/hana/data) more than 1.5RAM.

In our case we need to extend this volume by 128GB using SKU  8011367.

Please advise the correct understanding and let me know if we can proceed purchasing the SKU 8011367.

System Specs:

RAM: 256GB

/hana/data: 370 GB

cloud architect

BR,

Mostafa

entry.title: What scope item for Project system in Private cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone please let me know scope items in Private cloud relevant for project system.

Thank You in advance,

BRM.

entry.title: Valuation WIP in different ledgers w/o Material Ledger/Actual Costing
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

i have a customer who needs to calculate their Work in Process for various ledgers differently without Actual Costing, because we are still in the realization phase (only recommended after Go-Live).

In order to do so, we need to post the material consumptions on the production order in different ledgers with different values (SAP standard posts the same value in 0L for the other ledgers as well).

  • Did anyone have this requirement as well and implemented it without Actual Costing? 
  • How did you proceed? Was it an own development?
  • Or did you wait after Go-Live and implemented Actual Costing? 

 

Thanks for your help and Best regards

entry.title: Tracking Extension Types in S/4HANA Cloud (Private Edition)
entry.content:
Hi,

We would like to understand how clean the S/4HANA core is and analyze the extensions built on top of it.

Is there any way to track the types of extensions built on an S/4HANA Cloud (Private Edition) system?

Such as

- Classic ABAP extensions
- Key user extensions
- Developer extensions

 

Thanks
Trim

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition  ABAP Extensibility

entry.title: Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations Ownership
entry.content:
Team,
Please let me know which SAP Functional Team [ SAP HCM etc...] or SAP Technical Team should be ROLE OWNER [ Role assignment approver or Role Content Approver] for Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations. Also, please share location of relevant documentation - if available. 

Thanks

Raj

entry.title: no reference documents appear when create return order in app "Manage Customer Returns "
entry.content:
Hi experts，

When I create return order in PCE following scope item 3TE, in page "Create Returns Order from Reference Document", there are no reference documents in the list and appear even though I cleared all the filters. however, we already created many sales orders and billing documents.  

is there any one can tell me if I miss any configuration for return order in fiori?

entry.title: SAP ECC LIS tables (S861, S851, S852, S853) equivalent table in S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise us on SAP ECC LIS tables (S861, S851, S852, S853) equivalent table in S/4HANA Private Cloud.

 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: AVC_API to extract dependency related information from characteristics from SAP S4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise whether there is a way to extract dependency related information from characteristics from SAP S4HANA Private Cloud through a Standard API.

Please advise. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: How to create new transaction code with authorization AP or AR Ageing Report in sap.
entry.content:
Hi Guys

I have created t-code AP or AR Ageing report in sap s/4hana private cloud and assigned in se93 it was working t-code but here i am facing what authorization we will give to that t-code AP or AR Ageing report

please help me if any one knows 

Regards

Sukumar N

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
